'''βàöp-l-th-th''' ('''kapalthethoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:celebrappeal|celebrappeal]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-l-th-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:celebrappeal|celebrappeal]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| βàöp-l-th-th
|-
! Lemma
| kapalthethoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thipalthethoko|thipalthethoko]] || [[word:jipalthethoko|jipalthethoko]] || [[word:shipalthethoko|shipalthethoko]] || [[word:kipalthethoko|kipalthethoko]]
|-

|-

| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thapalthethoko|thapalthethoko]] || [[word:japalthethoko|japalthethoko]] || [[word:shapalthethoko|shapalthethoko]] || [[word:kapalthethoko|kapalthethoko]]

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
